migrations.description: Create ctb and doctrine schemas; ctb.table_registry for registry-first enforcement; doctrine.doctrine_library with pgvector embeddings (1536-dim, IVFFlat index); doctrine.doctrine_key with full-text GIN index; doctrine.doctrine_library_error; updated_at trigger on doctrine_library.
Drop all ctb/doctrine tables, triggers, functions, and schemas. Does not drop pgvector extension.

rollback_plan.verification: Verify ctb.table_registry, doctrine.doctrine_library, doctrine.doctrine_key, doctrine.doctrine_library_error are absent. Verify ctb and doctrine schemas are absent.

validation_steps.expected: Returns 20 (all registered tables across cl, lcs, ctb, doctrine schemas).

validation_steps.step: SELECT count(*) FROM doctrine.doctrine_library WHERE status = 'ACTIVE';

validation_steps.expected: Returns 9 (CLIENT, COMP, FIN, GOV, OPS, PROD, RPT, SALES, SYS).

validation_steps.step: SELECT indexname FROM pg_indexes WHERE schemaname = 'doctrine' AND tablename = 'doctrine_library' AND indexname = 'idx_dl_embedding';
validation_steps.expected: Returns 1 row confirming IVFFlat vector index exists.

validation_steps.step: SELECT tgname FROM pg_trigger WHERE tgname = 'trg_set_updated_at';
validation_steps.expected: Returns 1 row confirming updated_at trigger exists on doctrine.doctrine_library.

validation_steps.step: SELECT indexname FROM pg_indexes WHERE schemaname = 'doctrine' AND tablename = 'doctrine_key' AND indexname = 'idx_dk_title_search';
validation_steps.expected: Returns 1 row confirming GIN full-text index exists on doctrine.doctrine_key.

validation_steps.step: SELECT table_schema, table_name, leaf_type FROM ctb.table_registry WHERE table_schema IN ('ctb', 'doctrine') ORDER BY table_schema, table_name;
validation_steps.expected: Returns 4 rows: ctb.table_registry (REGISTRY), doctrine.doctrine_key (REGISTRY), doctrine.doctrine_library (CANONICAL), doctrine.doctrine_library_error (ERROR).

tables_migrated.note: Original 3 rows from research DB; 17 additional rows registered post-migration for CL/LCS tables

pre_generation_checks.registry_first: PASS — all 4 tables registered in ctb.table_registry
pre_generation_checks.cardinality: PASS — SYSTEM_CORE/DOCTRINE_MGMT: 1 CANONICAL (doctrine_library) + 1 ERROR (doctrine_library_error) + 2 REGISTRY (doctrine_key, table_registry)
pre_generation_checks.raw_immutability: N/A — doctrine tables are CONFIG (updatable status/version), not RAW append-only
pre_generation_checks.vendor_json_containment: PASS — doctrine_library_error.offending_payload is JSONB but is an ERROR table (error tables are exempt from vendor JSON law)
